sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97270" key="strotage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στροταγέω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρόταγος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρότος</orth>, <sense id="n97270.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στρατηγέω, στρατηγός, στρατός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
